The productivity chrome extension designed to make you aware of distractions and help you reduce their impact.

**NOTE** Declutter only works on websites created or reloaded after the extension has been installed.

Declutter contains two main features - Tracker and Focus. 

Tracker tracks the time you spend on each website you visit throughout the day and displays it. It makes you aware of what websites you are spending a lot of time on in the browser.

Focus lets you specify websites which you can group together by simply pressing a button. You can ungroup them whenever you like and can resume from wherever you left off.

These features were designed to be used together. You can specify websites that may be distracting you, and can choose to group them while you want to get other work done. 

By not seeing the websites that distract you alongside the various other tabs you have open, you are less likely to get distracted by them and can work on whatever you have to do.

DGGR Bookmark | タブをまとめて保存できるブックマークツール
タブをまとめて保存。大量にサイトを閲覧する人向けのブックマークツール

● 調査作業のために生まれたブックマークツール

DGGR（ディガー）は「調査作業」の工数を減らし、
快適にすることを目指して作られた新しいブックマークツールです。

新しいサービスの立ち上げ、新しい事業立ち上げ、新しいクリエイティブの調査、競合製品の調査、ツイートのためのネタ集め、ブログ記事のネタあつめ、有価証券の情報収集、暗号資産の新しいジャンルの競合調査、DYOR、メタバース、NFT、M2E…


…

● 速さがウリです

クラウドにページを保存していくタイプのブックマークは、投稿完了の待ち時間が発生します。
DGGRはその待ち時間がありません。大半の動作はローカルで動かしているので、キビキビと動きます。

…

● 直感的な操作で保存と整理がストレスなく行える

直感的な操作で、ページの保存と整理ができます。
すぐに整理できるのは、備え付けのブックマークにはない利点です。

…

● 出力・シェア機能が充実
作成したブックマークを即座にテキストに出力できます。
コピーボタンを押すだけで、クリップボードに即出力。
Slackやnotionでの社内共有はもちろん、ブログ記事作成の元ネタや、ツイート記事の元ネタに使えます。

…

● 複数種類のブックマークを切り替えできる。
ブックマークを複数持ち、いつでも柔軟に切り替えることができます。
「ワークスペース」を切り替えるだけの簡単操作です。
これにより使い捨てのブックマーク集を作成するなど、ブックマークに幅が広がります。
Track and analyze your browser tab lifecycle with visual charts

TabLogger tracks every tab you open, showing you exactly how you browse. See real-time stats, explore your tab history, and discover your browsing patterns—all with zero data leaving your device.

WHAT YOU GET

Live Dashboard
- Today's stats at a glance: tabs opened, closed, and currently active
- Average tab lifespan with day-over-day trends
- Activity heatmap: visualize browsing patterns by hour or day across the week
- Domain distribution chart: pie chart of top 10 visited domains (current/24h/7d/30d views)
- Interactive charts for most visited URLs (weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly views)
- Top 10 longest-living active tabs
- One-click bookmark creation for long-living tabs

Smart Popup
- See all open tabs organized by window (main/background)
- Quick search to find any tab instantly (by title or URL)
- Display tab open duration and memory usage (if available)
- One-click tab switching or activation
- Close tabs directly from the popup
- Easy navigation to Dashboard, History, and Settings

Full History
- Complete log of every closed tab with all metadata
- Real-time search by title or URL
- Time filters: All Time, Today, This Week, This Month
- Sort by: Most Recent, Oldest, Longest Duration, Shortest Duration
- Batch select and delete operations
- Flexible pagination: 20/50/100/200 items per page
- Export filtered results or entire history

Export Your Data
- CSV format for Excel/Google Sheets
- JSON format for developers
- Export filtered results or full history

Your Data, Your Rules
- Auto-cleanup policies: 7, 30, 90 days, or keep forever
- Real-time storage usage monitor (used/quota percentage)
- Language selection: Switch between 5 languages
- Export options: CSV or JSON with one click
- One-click data reset with confirmation
- 100% local storage—nothing leaves your browser

5 Languages Supported
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Japanese

PRIVACY FIRST

- All data stored locally on your device
- No accounts, no sign-ups, no tracking
- No external servers or analytics
- Minimal permissions: only "tabs", "storage", and "bookmarks"

WHO IS THIS FOR?

- Tab hoarders curious about their habits
- Productivity seekers wanting to understand browsing patterns
- Researchers tracking browsing sessions
- Developers debugging tab behavior
- Anyone who wants insights into their tab usage

KEY FEATURES

1. Real-Time Dashboard - Live stats, activity heatmap, domain distribution, and interactive charts
2. Activity Heatmap - Visualize browsing patterns across time
3. Domain Distribution - Pie chart showing top 10 visited domains
4. Tab History - Search, filter, sort with flexible pagination
5. Bookmark Integration - Convert long-living tabs to bookmarks
6. Data Export - CSV or JSON, anytime
7. 100% Private - All data stays on your device
8. 5 Languages - EN, ZH-CN, ZH-TW, KO, JA

PERMISSIONS EXPLAINED

Tabs Permission
We use the "tabs" permission to track tab lifecycle events (open, close, update, activate) in real-time. This is the core functionality of TabLogger—monitoring when tabs are created, closed, or switched to provide you with accurate browsing statistics and history. No tab content is accessed, only metadata like URL, title, and timestamps.

Storage Permission
The "storage" permission allows us to save your tab history and settings locally on your device using Chrome's sync storage API. All data stays on your device and is never transmitted to external servers. This enables features like browsing history, statistics persistence, and user preferences (language, data retention policies, etc.).

Bookmarks Permission
We use the "bookmarks" permission to let you convert long-living active tabs into bookmarks with one click. This optional feature helps you preserve important tabs you've kept open for extended periods. The extension only creates bookmarks when you explicitly click the bookmark button—it never reads or modifies your existing bookmarks.

PRIVACY CERTIFICATION

TabLogger is 100% privacy-focused:
- All data stored locally using Chrome's storage API
- No external servers, no analytics, no tracking
- No user accounts or authentication required
- No data collection or sharing with third parties
- Open source and auditable
Periodic, gentle tab reviews — not silent auto-closing. Track tab activity, group by topic, declutter on your terms.

You open Chrome. There are 87 tabs. You can't close any of them — what if you need that one?

Tab Hygiene keeps your tabs from turning into a graveyard. Once a week, it shows you a calm review of tabs you've forgotten — grouped by topic — and lets you decide what to keep, close (saved to a searchable archive), or save as a Chrome bookmark. Nothing closes without your OK.

Three quick utilities for everyday cleanup, all free:
• Close duplicate tabs — one click, all windows.
• Group all tabs by topic — Dev, Communication, Docs, Video, Social, AI, and more.
• Shrink to N tabs — close the oldest in your current window until only N remain.

Available in English, Español, Русский, and Deutsch.

For power users, Pro adds an extended mode that helps you push back against tab clutter more actively — custom rules, background auto-close, full searchable archive (up to 500 000 closed tabs), bulk restore / bookmark / forget, advanced search ranges.

It might sound scary at first. In practice, it just works.

100% local. No tracking. No accounts. No permissions on the sites you visit.

Free + Pro $19 lifetime, with a 14-day free trial.

A tab manager that organizes tabs based on your mood

Overview: Are you overwhelmed by countless open tabs? Struggling to focus on your tasks with all those distractions? Meet the Mood-Based Tab Manager, your ultimate solution for better tab management and increased productivity. This Chrome extension lets you organise and manage your tabs based on your current mood or focus level, helping you to stay on track with your tasks.

Key Features:
Mood Categories: Define and switch between mood categories like "Work," "Relax," "Social," and more. Customise each mood with specific tabs to suit your workflow.

Customisable Moods: Personalise your mood categories by assigning specific websites and settings to each mood. Tailor the experience to match your needs.

Site Management: Pre-assign moods to specific sites, ensuring that your tabs are automatically organised when you visit them. 


Tab Management: Seamlessly switch between moods, with the extension automatically grouping and hiding tabs that don't fit the selected mood. Supports multi-mood selection for those who juggle multiple tasks.

User-Friendly Interface: Enjoy a clean and intuitive interface for selecting moods, managing tabs, and adjusting settings.

DND Mode (Do Not Disturb): Activate DND mode to block all notifications from websites, ensuring complete focus on your tasks.

Shortcuts:  Easily manage and switch between moods with customisable keyboard shortcuts, allowing you to quickly organise your tabs based on your current focus or activity.

Why Choose Mood-Based Tab Manager? This extension simplifies your browsing experience by categorising your tabs according to your current mood, making it easier to focus on what’s important. Whether you're working, relaxing, or socialising, you can ensure that only the relevant tabs are visible, reducing distractions and boosting productivity.


Using Mood-Based Tab Manager:

Switching Moods:
  Click on the extension icon and select your current mood from the list.
  The extension will automatically group and hide tabs that don’t match the selected 
  mood. You can select multiple moods if needed.

Site Management:
  Pre-assign moods to specific websites via the "Site Management" tab in the 
  settings menu.This ensures that tabs related to these sites are automatically organised based on the assigned mood.

DND Mode (Do Not Disturb):
 Activate DND mode by selecting it from the mood list.While DND is active, all notifications from websites will be blocked, allowing you to focus without 
 interruptions.


Future Features (Coming Soon):
 Mood Tracker Integration: The extension will soon integrate with mood tracking 
   apps to automatically adjust your tab organisation based on your mood.

AI-Driven Suggestions: Get personalised suggestions for mood settings based on your browsing history, enhancing the extension’s adaptability.

Memory Optimisation: Memory optimisation through advanced tab discarding will be available to reduce the system load, making your browsing experience smoother.
TabSense is an AI-powered Chrome extension that organizes your tabs into groups and streamlines your browsing.

TabSense makes it easy to stay productive, whether you use AI-based grouping or prefer custom rules. 

Features:

⚡Custom Grouping Rules - Create personalized rules based on URLs, hostnames or page titles
⌨️Keyboard Shortcuts - Navigate and manage tabs efficiently with quick commands
🖱️Flexible AI Control - Toggle AI grouping on or off with one click
🔀Intuitive Tab Management - Easily drag and drop tabs between groups
🔄Smart Regrouping - Refresh groupings instantly when needed
🗑️Quick Cleanup Options - Remove or ungroup tab collections with a single click

Whether you're researching, shopping, or working across multiple projects, TabSense helps you maintain a structured browser environment. Keep your digital workspace organized automatically and focus on what matters.
Visualize tab lineage — see which tabs spawned which, with color-coded groups and breadcrumb trails.

See where every tab came from.
Ever open 30 tabs deep into a research rabbit hole and lose track of how you got there? Tab Trail automatically tracks the parent-child relationships between your tabs, so you always know which tab spawned which — and can retrace your steps.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🌿 BREADCRUMB ANCESTRY BAR
A sleek bar at the top of every page shows the full lineage of your current tab — from the root page all the way down to where you are now. Each ancestor is clickable, so you can jump back up the chain instantly.
Choose between two modes:

Hover mode — a subtle 2px color strip sits at the top of the page. Mouse over it to reveal the full breadcrumb trail. Clean and out of the way.
Sticky mode — the breadcrumb bar stays pinned at the top of every page, always visible. Great for deep research sessions where you want constant awareness of where you are in a trail. You can minimize it anytime with one click.

The color strip changes color based on how deep you are in a tab tree — blue for shallow, green, orange, red, and purple as you go deeper — so you get an instant visual cue without even opening the extension.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎨 AUTO-GROUPED TAB LINEAGE
Tab Trail automatically groups related tabs using Chrome's native tab groups. When you cmd-click (or ctrl-click) a link and spawn a new tab, Tab Trail groups the parent and child together, color-coded by their shared root ancestor.
Each lineage tree gets its own color — blue, red, yellow, green, pink, cyan, orange, or purple — so you can see at a glance which tabs are related, right in your tab bar. The group is named after the root domain where the trail started.
This means your tab bar goes from a wall of indistinguishable favicons to an organized, color-coded map of your browsing sessions. No manual grouping required.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔢 DEPTH BADGE
The Tab Trail extension icon shows a small badge number indicating how deep the current tab is in its ancestry tree. Depth 1 means it's a root tab. Depth 5 means you're five links deep from where you started. A quick glance tells you how far down the rabbit hole you've gone.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🗂️ FULL TREE VIEW
Click the extension icon to open the popup, then switch to the "Full Tree" tab to see every open tab organized as a forest of ancestry trees. Parent tabs branch into children, which branch into grandchildren, and so on.
Features:

Expand/collapse any branch to focus on what matters
Expand All / Collapse All buttons for quick navigation
Search bar to filter tabs by title — matching tabs and their ancestors stay visible, everything else is hidden
Color-coded depth dots so you can see the structure at a glance
Click any tab to switch to it instantly
Closed ancestor tabs are dimmed but kept visible so the trail stays intact

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚙️ FULLY CONFIGURABLE
Everything is toggleable. Open Settings in the popup to control:

Auto-group tabs by lineage — on/off
Depth badge on extension icon — on/off
Breadcrumb bar on pages — on/off
Sticky vs. hover breadcrumb bar — your choice

Don't want tab groups cluttering your tab bar? Turn them off. Just want the breadcrumb bar? You got it. Every feature works independently.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WHO IS THIS FOR?

Researchers who open dozens of tabs from a single starting point and need to retrace their steps
Developers who jump between docs, Stack Overflow, GitHub issues, and API references — and want to know which tab led where
Students writing papers who follow citation chains and need to find their way back
Anyone who's ever stared at 40 open tabs and thought "how did I get here?"
Power users who want their tab bar to actually make sense

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIVACY & PERFORMANCE

Zero data collection. Tab Trail stores everything locally in your browser using Chrome's session and local storage APIs. Nothing is sent anywhere, ever.
No accounts, no analytics, no tracking.
Lightweight background service worker — no impact on page load times.
Closed tabs are pruned after 1 hour (unless they're still needed as ancestors of open tabs).
Session data resets on browser restart for a clean slate. Settings persist across sessions.
Open source and transparent.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PERMISSIONS EXPLAINED
Tab Trail requests only the permissions it needs:

"tabs" — to track which tab opened which, and to read tab titles/URLs for display
"tabGroups" — to auto-group related tabs by lineage
"storage" — to save your settings and tab ancestry data locally
"activeTab" — to show the breadcrumb bar on the current page

No "host permissions" beyond the content script that renders the breadcrumb bar. No access to your browsing history, bookmarks, or any data beyond what's needed to draw the trail.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
TIPS

Cmd-click (Mac) or Ctrl-click (Windows/Linux) links to open them in new tabs — this is how Chrome sets the opener relationship that Tab Trail tracks.
Right-click → "Open link in new tab" also works.
Tabs opened from the address bar or bookmarks won't have a parent (they become root tabs).
If auto-grouping feels too aggressive, turn it off and just use the breadcrumb bar and tree view instead.
AI-powered browser automation assistant. Control web pages with natural language.

FillNow 是一款基于 AI 的表单自动填充工具，帮助你快速填写各种网页表单。

Just a tab - Tab Manager & Duplicate Cleaner
All tabs in one page. One‑click duplicate cleanup. Save windows with tab groups. Page reminders.

See all your tabs at once, clean up duplicates safely, and save whole windows for later — now you can also save the current window directly from the extension popup. Smart default window names help you save faster, and you can delete saved windows anytime with a confirmation. Set page reminders with notes and get a New Tab prompt when it’s time.

Core features
- Tab Overview: see all tabs in one page, grouped by domain or Chrome tab group.
- Duplicate Cleanup: close duplicates in one click; hover highlights affected tabs before you act.
- Auto Duplicate Guard: if a URL is already open in the same window, switch to the existing tab instead of opening another one.
- Save & Reopen Windows: save the current window from the popup or New Tab page, with a smart suggested name (based on tab groups or top sites), preview its pages, reopen later with original tab groups and pinned tabs preserved. Delete saved windows with a confirmation when you no longer need them.
- Page Reminders (New): set a reminder for any page with optional notes; when it’s due, your New Tab shows a non-blocking prompt so you can open it or remind later.

Extras
- Settings menu: toggle auto duplicate guard and open the visit stats panel.
- Pinned favorites, sorting by recent/visits, visit stats, dark mode, live updates.

Privacy & Permissions
- Uses tabs, tabGroups, activeTab, storage; data stays local.

Keywords
tab manager, duplicate cleaner, window save/restore, saved windows, page reminders

Changelog

- 5.1.20 Saved windows improvements: save from popup; smart default names; delete saved windows with confirmation.
- 5.1.19 Page reminders: set reminders with notes; New Tab prompts when due; manage reminders.
- 5.1.18 UX improvements.
- 5.1.17 Saved window preview now groups tabs by domain and adds an “Open” button next to each tab title.
- 5.1.15 Save and name the current window; preview contents; reopen in a new window with original tab groups and pinned tabs preserved. Auto block duplicated tabs in the same window; settings menu with toggle and visit stats entry.
- 5.1.14 Resolve some issues.
- 5.1.13 Pin frequently visited pages to the top.
- 5.1.12 Supports different sorting orders.
- 5.1.11 Visit stats and UX improvements.
- 5.1.10 Dark mode style optimization.
- 5.1.9 Close tabs not visited for several days.
- 5.1.6 Reload data when switching back to New Tab; bug fixes.
- 5.1.5 One-click duplicate cleanup; view by Chrome tab groups; bug fixes.
- 5.1.3 Display URL pathname below each tab title.
- 5.1.4 / 5.1.1 Duplicate removal improvements; automatically close duplicated New Tabs.

中文版（Chinese）

一页看清所有标签，安全清理重复项，并支持保存/重开窗口（保留标签组与置顶）——现在也支持在插件 popup 弹窗里一键保存当前窗口。保存窗口时会自动生成更贴近内容的默认名称，减少命名负担；已保存窗口也支持删除（含二次确认）。设置页面提醒，可写备注，到时间在新标签页提示你回来处理。

核心功能
- 标签总览：一页看清所有标签，按域名或 Chrome 标签组分组。
- 去重清理：一键关闭重复标签；悬停高亮受影响标签，动作更可预期。
- 自动防重复：当你在同一窗口打开已存在的 URL 时，自动切换到已打开的标签，而不是再新开一个。
- 保存与重开窗口：支持在 popup 弹窗或新标签页保存当前窗口，并自动给出智能默认名称（优先基于标签组名，其次基于常见站点），支持预览；一键在新窗口重开，保留原有标签组与置顶标签。不需要时可删除已保存窗口（含二次确认）。
- 页面提醒（新功能）：为任意页面设置提醒并添加备注；到时间会在新标签页以非阻断提示的方式提醒你，可一键打开或稍后提醒。

补充能力
- 设置菜单：开关“自动防重复”功能，并从这里进入访问统计面板。
- 置顶常用、按最近/次数排序、访问统计、暗色主题、实时刷新。

隐私与权限
- 仅用 tabs、tabGroups、activeTab、storage；数据仅保存在本地。

更新日志
- 5.1.21 更快速、更智能地从当前窗口和历史记录中找到需要的网页。
- 5.1.20 已保存窗口体验优化：支持在 popup 弹窗保存；保存时智能默认命名；支持删除已保存窗口（含二次确认）。
- 5.1.19 新增页面提醒：支持备注；到期在新标签页提示；可统一管理提醒。
- 5.1.18 交互体验优化。

Aflo - Automatic Flows for Browser Tabs
Aflo is a browser extension that automates workflows for browser tabs, enhancing productivity and organization.

Aflo: Intelligent Tab Automation, Redefining Browser Efficiency!

Still losing your way in that crowded, chaotic tab bar at the top of your browser? Aflo revolutionizes Chrome browsing by leveraging intelligent automation to deliver an unprecedented, efficient, and organized tab management experience!

1. Product Overview

Aflo is an innovative Chrome browser tab automation tool. It works silently to automatically organize your chaotic tabs, grouping them by domain and cleaning up inactive ones. With intelligent grouping, powerful organization tools, and instantly accessible features, Aflo is the ultimate assistant for enhancing your browsing efficiency, maintaining focus, and unleashing your browser's full potential.

2. Core Advantages (Why Aflo?)

a. Eliminate Visual Chaos, Browse with Focus:

Say goodbye to overcrowded tab bars! Aflo automatically organizes your tabs, keeping your workspace clean and structured without requiring you to manually sort them.
Clean and Refreshed Browsing Area: By grouping related tabs instantly, Aflo reduces clutter, allowing you to focus solely on your content and enjoy a pure browsing experience.
b. Intelligent Auto-Grouping for Structured Management:

Smart Categorization by Domain: Aflo's core advantage! The extension automatically groups multiple tabs from the same website into its domain-specific native Tab Group (e.g., all open Zhihu questions automatically go into the "Zhihu" group). Instantly organizes chaos and centralizes related resources.
Group Expand/Collapse: Easily expand group contents with a single click or collapse them to save space. Swiftly switch between projects or topics without mental effort to remember tab locations.
c. Pin Critical Information with One Click, Never Lose It:

Essential Tabs, Guarded: For your most crucial tabs (like admin interfaces, core reference materials, or to-do lists), use the "Pin tab" feature. Keep them permanently visible on the left side of your tab bar - ensuring they are never accidentally closed or lost.
d. Eliminate Tab Bloat with Scheduled Archiving:

Automated Tab Organization Magic: Set a "Scheduled Archiving" (auto-close) time. Aflo efficiently closes inactive "sleeping" tabs, clearing browser memory burden and boosting performance. No more worrying about background tab buildup.
Customizable Durations: Set archiving intervals (e.g., 1hr, 3hrs, 24hrs) according to your workflow and habits for personalized management.
e. Efficient Operations at Your Fingertips:

Quick Access: Easily manage your tabs through the extension popup.
Effortless URL Copy: No more hunting through menus. Instantly copy the current tab's URL directly from the Aflo popup with one click.
Innovative QR Preview: Need to quickly send an open webpage to your phone? Aflo offers one-click "Preview QR Code" functionality! Scan to get the link instantly - breaking device barriers with zero-delay transfer.

3. Core Feature Summary

Automated Tab Management: Hands-free organization running in the background
Auto-Grouping by Domain: Intelligent tab organization into website-specific groups
Group Expand/Collapse: Effortlessly control information density
Pin Essential Tabs: Ensure critical information never gets buried
Scheduled Archiving (Auto-Close): Automatically clear inactive tabs to optimize performance
One-Click URL Copy: Instant link copying for seamless sharing
Current Tab QR Preview: Swift mobile transfer for desktop webpages
Intuitive Interface: Clean design with logical operation flow

4. Who Needs Aflo?

Researchers/Academics: Ideal for managing numerous reference materials automatically
Information Gatherers/Content Creators: Efficiently organize source materials and inspiration without manual sorting
Project Managers & Developers: Automatically group related project docs and debug pages
Productivity Enthusiasts: Anyone tired of default browser tab chaos wanting workflow enhancement
Multitaskers & Heavy Tab Users: Essential for managing information overload with zero effort

5. Easy Installation & Usage

Search for "Aflo" in the Chrome Web Store
Click "Add to Chrome"
Click the Extensions icon (puzzle piece) in Chrome's top-right corner and Pin Aflo to your toolbar for easy access.
Once installed, your tabs will be automatically grouped by domain - start enjoying efficient management immediately!
Click the Aflo icon to access settings and quick actions (QR Code, Copy URL, etc.).

Manage tabs from a sidebar panel with auto-grouping, custom groups, and drag-and-drop organization.

Tab Deleter - A powerful sidebar for managing your browser tabs

FEATURES:

- Sidebar Panel - Click the extension icon to open a clean sidebar showing all your tabs organized by groups

- Auto-Grouping - Automatically groups tabs by domain when 2+ tabs share the same site (e.g., all YouTube tabs grouped together)

- Custom Groups - Create your own groups with custom names, colors, and domain patterns. Tabs matching your patterns are automatically sorted into the right group

- Drag & Drop - Reorder tabs and groups by dragging. Move tabs between groups or to "Other" (ungrouped)

- Quick Actions - Right-click tabs to duplicate, close, or move to another group

- Collapse/Expand - Click group headers to collapse or expand. Use header buttons to collapse/expand all groups at once

- Rename Groups - Double-click any group name to rename it inline

- Dark Mode - Automatically adapts to your system's light/dark theme

- Tab Count Badge - See your total tab count on the extension icon

- Sleep Groups - Put tab groups to sleep to save memory. Sleeping groups save URLs and can be restored later

- All Windows Mode - Optionally show and manage tabs from all browser windows in one sidebar

- Audio Indicator - See which tabs are playing audio with a speaker icon on the favicon

Works with Chrome and Brave browsers.

## Changelog

### v1.7.0 (2026-05-07)
- Add "scroll to playing tab" header button — cycles through tabs currently playing audio, activating each in turn so you can pause/mute it
- Add "scroll to active tab" header button and persist sidebar collapse/expand state
- Fix YouTube content script not being included in published package (progress bars now work after install)
- Reduce render thrashing: sidebar now ignores tab-update events that don't affect what's drawn
- Coalesce rapid grouping work (e.g. session restore) into a single bulk pass instead of dozens of serialized operations
- Make group-tracking writes durable across service-worker suspension
- Fix lost-write race in ghost-group expiry
- Make YouTube content script idempotent on re-injection (no listener pile-up after extension reload)
- Settings handlers no longer fire twice on save
- Better error handling for "No SW" / "Extension context invalidated" during service-worker hibernation

Visually switch Chrome Tab Groups like macOS Cmd+Tab using Option+Q.

本拡張機能はGeminiによって開発されています。
This extension was developed by Gemini.


タブグループは便利ですが、マウスでクリックして切り替えるのは面倒ではありませんか？ この拡張機能は、macOS標準の「アプリスイッチャー（Command + Tab）」と同じ操作感と見た目を、Chromeのタブグループに持ち込みます。

✨ 主な機能:

- 直感的なショートカット: Option + Q を押すとメニューが表示されます。キーを押しっぱなしにして Q で選択（Shift + Q で逆順）、Option を離すと決定。マウスでの選択も可能です。
- スマートな並び順 (MRU): 「最近使った順」にグループが並ぶため、2つの作業グループを交互に行き来するのが劇的に速くなります。
- グループカラーの反映: Chromeで設定したタブグループの色が、メニューのアイコンや枠線にそのまま反映されます。

⚡️ 使い方:

1. Option (Alt) キーを押しながら Q を押します。
2. Option キーを押したまま、Q を押して移動したいグループを選びます（Shift + Q で逆順）。
3. Option キーを離すと、そのグループのタブに切り替わります。

キャンセル: 切り替えを中止したい場合は、Esc キーを押すか、メニューの外側（背景）をクリックしてください。

⚠️ 注意事項:

- 動作しないページについて: Chromeのセキュリティ仕様上、「新しいタブ」画面（初期画面）、Chrome設定ページ、Chromeウェブストアでは、この拡張機能は動作しません（メニューが表示されません）。これは不具合ではなくChromeの制限によるものです。
- テキスト入力について: 入力フォームでの誤入力を防ぐ強力な対策を行っていますが、一部のWebサイトではショートカットキー入力時に文字（œ や q）がテキストボックスに入力されてしまう場合があります。
- ショートカットキーの変更について: 現在のバージョンでは、起動ショートカットは Option + Q (Alt + Q) に固定 されており、変更することはできません。
- 特定ページでの無効化について: 現在のバージョンでは、特定のサイトやページでのみ機能を停止（除外設定）することはできません。
- プライバシーについて: この拡張機能は画面上にメニューを描画するために全ページへのアクセス権限を使用しますが、キー入力データの収集や外部への送信は一切行いません。

------

Chrome Tab Groups are great for organizing, but switching between them usually requires mouse clicks. This extension brings the fluid, visual experience of the macOS App Switcher (Cmd + Tab) directly to your Chrome Tab Groups.

✨ Key Features:

- Intuitive Shortcuts: Press Option + Q to open the switcher. Hold Option and tap Q to cycle through groups (or Shift + Q for reverse), then release to switch. Mouse selection is also supported.
- Smart Sorting (MRU): Groups are sorted by "Most Recently Used." This makes toggling back and forth between two active projects instantaneous.
- Visual Context: The switcher inherits the colors you've assigned to your Chrome Tab Groups.

⚡️ How to Use:

1. Hold the Option (Alt) key and press Q.
2. While holding Option, press Q to cycle through your groups (or Shift + Q to go backward).
3. Release the Option key to switch to the selected group's active tab.

To Cancel: Press Esc or click outside the menu (background) to close the switcher without switching.

⚠️ Notes:

- Restricted Pages: Due to Chrome's security policies, this extension cannot function on the "New Tab" page, Chrome Settings, or the Chrome Web Store. The menu will not appear on these pages.
- Text Input Conflicts: Although advanced measures are implemented to prevent text input conflicts, on rare websites, the shortcut character (œ or q) may accidentally be entered into text fields.
- Fixed Shortcut Key: In the current version, the shortcut key is fixed to Option + Q (Alt + Q) and cannot be customized.
- No Exclusion List: It is not currently possible to disable the extension only on specific websites or pages.
- Privacy Policy: This extension requires access to all pages solely to render the visual overlay on top of the website. It does not collect, store, or transmit any of your keystrokes or browsing data.
Auto-collapses (and optionally reorders) inactive tab groups in the tab bar, and adds new tabs to the currently active tab's group

Adds usability improvements related to Tab Groups: Auto-collapses groups except the active tab's group, auto-aligns this "active group" to leftmost / rightmost while restoring the correct ordering of the groups (optional), and auto-assigns newly created tabs to the "active group" (optional).
Enhance your YouTube viewing experience, by sorting your open video tabs alphabetically, by channel name, view count or time.

YouTube Sort automatically organizes your open YouTube tabs by sorting them according to criteria you choose: channel name, title, duration, view count, likes, or upload date. If you regularly have dozens of YouTube tabs open and want to watch them in a specific order, this extension puts you in control.

**Features:**
- Sort tabs by: channel name, title, duration, view count, likes, or upload date
- Multi-window support: sort across all windows or just the current one
- Filter out: live streams, Shorts, Premieres, playlists, and unloaded/inactive tabs
- Statistics panel: see total video count, combined runtime, and total view count at a glance
- Move sorted tabs to the start or end of your window
- SponsorBlock integration: sort by net duration, accounting for skippable sponsor segments
- Auto-sort: automatically reorders tabs whenever a new YouTube tab opens
- Dark mode support
- Keyboard accessible
